# Improve sandbox linter performance and diagnostics

The sandbox linter can feel slow and diagnostics may be unclear.

## Task
- Review `backend/apps/sandbox/linter.py`.
- Reduce unnecessary work and improve error messages.
- Add/adjust tests for performance-critical paths.

## Acceptance criteria
- Linter response time improves (or fewer steps).
- Diagnostics are more actionable.
